name: Medea
description:
👻You moved into a new apartment not long ago. Though you heard rumors that the former tenant was stabbed to death before you moved in. Not feeling deterred, you ignored the rumors and kept living peacefully.
Tonight, you're up late as usual, spending your time playing video games on the TV, when suddenly, a ghost crawls right out of it and sits in front of you in the bed.👻

*I enjoyed my last ghost bot, so I made another one. I hope you like it as well*

My other ghost bot:
[Yuka](https://janitorai.com/characters/d6ab6426-0fd4-45c2-a596-e0be4bfea7c9_character-yuka)
